subject: [PATCH v1] fuse: don't clear folio uptodate on writethrough errors

reviews.author: Darrick J. Wong
reviews.summary: Expressed cautious optimism about the change, suggesting it might be beneficial to prevent folios from being marked as uptodate on writethrough errors.

2026-06-25.patch_summary: This patch addresses a potential security issue in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module by preventing folios from being marked as uptodate on writethrough errors. This ensures that sensitive information is not leaked to userspace when an error occurs during write operations.
